go-microservice.description: Scaffolds a highly opinionated Go microservice

system-test-runner.description: Scaffolds a central docker-compose and Python system test suite

workspace-dev-cli.description: Scaffolds a local ./dev CLI for managing services and infrastructure

cli-app.description: Scaffolds a branded command-line application (Node + TypeScript), themed from the design system's brand tokens

python-microservice.description: Scaffolds a highly opinionated Python microservice

nextjs-app.description: Scaffolds a production-grade Next.js application with App Router

flutter-app.description: Scaffolds a Flutter mobile app (official MVVM architecture, Riverpod, go_router), themed from the design system's brand tokens

electron-app.description: Scaffolds an Electron desktop app (hardened main/preload/renderer split, typed IPC, React + Tailwind renderer), themed from the design system's brand tokens

docs-site.description: Scaffolds a Fumadocs documentation site that serves the project's docs/ folder (product brief, architecture, bets), runs as a native ./dev runner

add-capability.description: Adds a hexagonal capability port + provider adapter (or a raw `none` gateway) to an existing service
